body: Hi {{customer_name}}, this is a reminder that {{crew_name}} will be arriving tomorrow at {{start_time}} for {{job_name}}.
Hi {{customer_name}}, {{crew_name}} is on the way and should arrive around {{start_time}}. See you soon!
Hi {{customer_name}}, {{crew_name}} is running about {{delay_minutes}} minutes behind schedule today. Thanks for your patience.
Hi {{customer_name}}, quick update on {{job_name}}: we are about {{percent_complete}}% complete and on track. Let us know if you have any questions.
Hi {{customer_name}}, we need to reschedule our visit for {{job_name}}. Would {{new_date}} work for you? Sorry for any inconvenience.
Hi {{customer_name}}, {{job_name}} is complete! Let us know if you have any questions.
